heading: Reinstatement or restoration; individuals suspended or removed for national security
label: 3571 Reinstatement or restoration; individuals suspended or removed for national security
text: An individual suspended or removed under may be restored to duty in the discretion of the head of the agency concerned.section 7532 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (1st 31 words of 3d proviso).5 U.S.C. 22–1(1st 31 words of 3d proviso), .Aug. 26, 1950, ch. 803, § 164 Stat. 477The words “suspended or removed under ” are coextensive with and substituted for “whose employment is so suspended or terminated under the authority of said sections”.section 7532 of this titleStandard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
